actions: Implemented System Tray cross-compatibility (tray_icon.py) bypassing tkinter WM_DELETE_WINDOW limitations.
Implemented DiscordPresenceManager locally in automation tick to bind Discord Rich Presence efficiently to LCU queue phases.
Designed and mapped a floating 400x60 MiniPlayer dashboard bound to hotkey ctrl+shift+m.
outcome: Success. Dev server boot validation passed gracefully with fallbacks.

task: Fix Arena Synergy Instant Lock-in Bug
actions: Diagnosed POST /complete silent failures and replaced with PATCH + completed: True
Identified that iterating the LCU actions matrix caused false positives for teammate lock status
Replaced actions matrix iteration with teammate.get("championId", 0) != 0 check
outcome: Success. Bot now reliably locks in, accurately checks teammate status, and avoids API rejections.

task: Automate Colab C2 Reverse Shell and Tunnel
actions: Extracted user requirements for Google Colab reverse shell setup
Created Gary (C2 Server) Bash setup script with UFW and Systemd persistence
Created Python payload cell for Google Colab to install SSH server, configure keys, and open persistent autossh tunnel
Generated Colab C2 automator capability to satisfy SELF_DIRECTED_CAPABILITY_GROWTH rule
outcome: Success. Reusable scripts created in payloads/colab_c2 and skill mapped.
